overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through an underground commercial transit tunnel. The environment transitions from a covered arcade with skylights to a darker industrial tunnel with neon lighting, large weapon advertisements, and ventilation systems.

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at the skylight structure

shops with illuminated displays and vertical neon signs
large curved glass skylight showing teal-colored night sky
red and purple neon signs on the commercial storefronts

segments.scene_description: Walking through a covered commercial arcade with illuminated storefronts on the left and a distinctive curved glass skylight overhead. The camera briefly tilts upward to observe the skylight structure before continuing forward toward the tunnel entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: underground transit tunnel with red tiled walls

events.description: blue car drives past in the opposite direction on the right

agents.ego_description: walking deeper into the underground tunnel away from the commercial area

notable_agents.action: blue car driving past in the opposite direction

entered.detail: glossy red ceramic tile walls lining the tunnel
dark concrete ceiling with linear fluorescent light fixtures

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the underground transit tunnel with glossy red tiled walls on the left and a dark concrete ceiling. A blue car drives past in the opposite direction as the environment transitions from the commercial arcade to the enclosed tunnel system.

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisements for Constitution Arms weapons mounted on the red wall

segments.scene_description: Walking through a curved section of the tunnel where large Constitution Arms weapon billboards illuminate the red tiled walls. A red sports car drives past on the right as the road curves ahead, marked by directional arrows on the asphalt.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial underground corridor with ventilation systems

events.description: transition from red tiled walls to industrial concrete section with large ventilation pipes

agents.ego_description: walking through the industrial tunnel section with exposed ventilation infrastructure

vertical yellow LED strip lights on the concrete wall
raw concrete walls replacing the previous red tile finish

segments.scene_description: Entering the industrial section of the tunnel where the red tiles give way to raw concrete walls with large ventilation pipes and yellow accent lighting. The environment becomes more utilitarian with exposed infrastructure and darker lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a bright, covered commercial arcade into a dark, utilitarian industrial tunnel. It begins by passing illuminated storefronts under a curved glass skylight, with the camera briefly tilting upward to observe the structure before moving toward the tunnel entrance. As the camera enters the underground system, the environment shifts to glossy red tiled walls and a dark concrete ceiling, punctuated by a blue car driving past in the opposite direction. The scene then curves through a section illuminated by large Constitution Arms weapon billboards and directional asphalt arrows, while a red sports car speeds past on the right. Finally, the red tiles give way to raw concrete walls and exposed ventilation pipes, as the lighting turns yellow and the atmosphere becomes increasingly industrial.
